violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item * was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Box of corn dogs in refrigerator not covered at time of inspection -Bucket of pickle spears without lid observed at time of inspection

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. -Cheddar dogs found in cooler with a date of 2/5. Thrown out.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -North concessions slushy machine, popcorn machine, coffee, and cappuccino machines in need of cleaning. -Cappuccino machine has build up inside the machine

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Cappuccino machine - found build up inside machine. In need of cleaning.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Microwaves need cleaning in north concessions -Hot dog roller has build up of grease.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Ice scoop found by ice machine on non-approved, non-cleanable surface.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single use items in boxes on floor in back storage area (North concession)

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Possible butter spilled in south concessions under popcorn machine.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
